name: galassetbox
description: Local-first galgame asset organizer with authorized plugin support.
author: GalAssetBox Contributors

scripts.check: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/extractor-gateway.js && node --check src/plugin-host.js && node --check src/authorized-plugins.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check examples/external-demo-plugin.gabplugin.js && node --check examples/plugin-package-demo/plugin.gabplugin.js && node --check scripts/gateway-check.js
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run gateway:check && node scripts/release-check.js
